title: Handoff Packet (Vigilia Chain v0.2)
description: Immutable context packet passed between chain steps via the Orchestrator.

handoff_id.description: Unique identifier for this handoff packet.

source_loop.description: Loop ID that produced the artifacts.

target_loop.description: Loop ID that will receive this context.

artifact_refs.description: Paths to artifacts produced by source_loop.

evidence_status.description: Level of verification of the evidence in the artifacts.

max_autonomy_level.description: Maximum autonomy level for the target loop.

forbidden_assumptions.description: Explicit list of assumptions the target loop must NOT make.

not_realtime_verified.description: If true, target loop must treat evidence as static/unverified.

no_m2_unlock.description: If true, target loop cannot propose M2 transition.

chain_context.description: Optional additional context from the chain state.
